name: Calista Double Sphere Lamp (Set of 2) - 27.75 Inch Height - LIT4313 - Oil Rub Bronze - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Calista table lamp set, measuring 27.75 inches and crafted from metal, these lamps bring an elegant touch to any space. Featuring an oil rubbed bronze finish, each lamp exudes a warm, sophisticated charm ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or offices. The double sphere design adds a unique architectural element, enhancing your decor with subtle artistry. Versatile and stylish, these lamps not only provide ambient lighting but also serve as stunning decorative pieces. Perfect for those looking to add a touch of refinement to their home. Illuminate your space with Calista and enjoy the seamless blend of function and style.
